programme.title: Savage Kingdom
programme.desc: Sekekama is forced to lead his family into hostile territory; his gamble leads him into a bloody contest against old rivals and new, but it is his control over one treacherous son that will determine Sekekama's hold on power.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Confronting venom and brutal heat as snakes seek shelter in all the wrong places.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Chase a rogue lizard and a python, and free an eastern brown caught in a fence.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Launch into spring's snake surge with Liv and Stu, who intercept two male brown snakes duelling for mating rights at a construction site; stand back as Dan and Jess rescue chickens from a python and Mick and Adele hunt for a rogue green tree snake.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Dash across southeast Queensland as breeding and snake-catching season ramp up; Adele and Mick go up against an eastern brown, the second-deadliest snake in the world; Stu and Liv tangle with a carpet python.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Love-struck browns, rogue reptiles, and deadly surprises keep wranglers on edge.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: A python on the roof and hidden snakes spark a series of perilous surprises.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Wranglers face venom, tangled traps and fierce reptiles in high-stakes rescues.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Deadly snakes lurk as elite wranglers race to stop danger before it strikes.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: The snakes are mating, invading a lounge and infiltrating a chicken coop.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Epic snake rescues: browns, pythons and a wild mating ball in Queensland!

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: It has been a year of farming for the Pol family; while Charles recovers from his injury, the farm shows no signs of slowing down.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: In preparation for lambs, the Pols shear the merino ewes; Charles has a terrifying accident, and the whole family rallies together.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: The Pols add four potentially pregnant merino ewes to their flock; Beth checks to see if her bees have survived the winter.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: The family goes into hyperdrive to fix the pasture fence and finish building the garden hardscape before the first snow falls; Beth is worried about the bees, so she brings in some expert help to hopefully ensure their survival.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: The Pols reach the most dangerous stage of disassembling the barn.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: The Pols are ready to tackle their next big project, which is taking down a barn.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: The Pol clan installs a new fence and heads to the small animal auction.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: The Pol family needs to bale some hay, and they bring in their next animal.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: The Pol clan is taking on their next big mission: building a family farm.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: The Pol family needs to finish planting hayseed, and they set up beehives.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: The Pols' hopes for livestock are threatened by sky-high bids at auction.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: The bidding begins at the large animal auction, and the Pols bid on taking home sheep and cows to their farm; the Pols finish working on the sheep hut.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: The Pols need to fix the sheep hut before winter arrives.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: The Pols get to work on building a garden; Beth surprises her brother.
